tasks.description: Phase 5 review cleanup: address independent review findings Y-NEW-1 through G-NEW-2
steps: Import captureErrors from ./helpers in test/e2e/error-resilience.test.ts, delete local duplicate
Add clarifying comment in test 5.1.1 about crash sim cleanup ordering
Add comment in test 5.4.3 about coupling to runtime re-add pattern
Add TODO comment in runOutputFlushLoop final flush for Phase 7
Run bun test — all tests must pass
Commit: phase-5: address independent review findings (Y-NEW-1 through G-NEW-2)

tasks.description: Structured logger: JSON output to stderr, level filtering, child loggers, global singleton. Replace all console.error/console.log in src/ with logger calls.
steps: Create src/core/logger.ts with Logger interface, createLogger(), setGlobalLogger(), getLogger()
JSON output to stderr via process.stderr.write(), ISO 8601 timestamps
Level filtering: debug < info < warn < error
child() method creates sub-logger with inherited context + optional level override
Write tests in test/unit/core/logger.test.ts: level filtering, JSON format, child logger, extra fields, per-plugin level, global setter/getter
Replace all console.error/console.log in src/ with logger calls (grep and replace)
Run bun test — all tests must pass
Commit: phase-6: add structured JSON logger with level filtering and child loggers

tasks.description: CLI framework: arg parsing, subcommand routing, --help, --config global option, entry point update
steps: Create src/cli/index.ts with main() function: parse argv, route to subcommands
Support: run, config (init|validate), version, --help/-h
Parse --config/-c global option (env COLLATR_EDGE_CONFIG, default /etc/collatr-edge/config.toml)
Update src/index.ts to call main() and process.exit()
Write tests in test/unit/cli/cli.test.ts: unknown command, no command, --help, config path parsing, config subcommand routing
Run bun test — all tests must pass
Commit: phase-6: add CLI framework with subcommand routing and arg parsing

tasks.description: version command: print version, runtime, platform, build time
steps: Create src/cli/commands/version.ts
Output: CollatrEdge version, Bun version, platform-arch, build timestamp
Write tests in test/unit/cli/version.test.ts: output format, exit code 0
Run bun test — all tests must pass
Commit: phase-6: add version command

tasks.description: config validate command: parse and validate config file, validate per-plugin schemas, report results. Requires exporting Zod schemas from all plugin files and creating a schema registry.
steps: Export Zod config schemas from all plugin source files (modbus, opcua, mqtt-consumer, internal, rename, filter, basicstats, local-store, file, stdout)
Create src/core/plugin-schemas.ts: central registry mapping plugin type+name to Zod schema
Create src/cli/commands/config-validate.ts: load file, parse config, validate per-plugin, report to stdout
Human-readable output with checkmarks/crosses/warnings
Write tests in test/unit/cli/config-validate.test.ts: valid config, invalid agent, invalid TOML, unknown plugin, invalid plugin config, secret refs, missing file, empty config
Run bun test — all tests must pass
Commit: phase-6: add config validate command with per-plugin schema validation

tasks.description: config init command: generate default TOML config template with comments, --output, --mode, --force options
steps: Create src/cli/commands/config-init.ts
Config template as string literal: [agent], [global_tags], inputs.internal, example modbus/opcua (commented), outputs.local_store, example file (commented)
--mode flag adjusts network_policy and hub sections (connected/local_network/standalone)
--output/-o flag for custom path (default ./collatr-edge.toml)
--force flag to overwrite existing
Write tests in test/unit/cli/config-init.test.ts: default generation, file exists error, --force, --output, --mode variations, generated config validates
Run bun test — all tests must pass
Commit: phase-6: add config init command with mode-aware template generation

tasks.description: Plugin factory: turn parsed AgentConfig into PipelineOptions. Instantiate real plugins from config, wire per-plugin overrides (interval, timeout, batch_size, period, drop_original, enabled), wire metric filters from config.
steps: Create src/pipeline/plugin-factory.ts with buildPipeline(config: AgentConfig): PipelineOptions
Plugin constructor registry: map plugin names to factory functions
Validate each plugin instance config against Zod schema
Wire per-plugin overrides: interval (duration parse), timeout (duration parse), metric_batch_size, period, drop_original
Respect enabled: false (skip plugin)
Wire metric filter fields (namepass/namedrop/tagpass/tagdrop/fieldpass/fielddrop) from config
Pass global_tags through to PipelineOptions
Refactor plugin constructors if needed to accept config objects

Write tests in test/unit/pipeline/plugin-factory.test.ts: minimal config, full config, unknown plugin, invalid config, duration parsing, per-plugin overrides, enabled:false, global tags, drop_original, filter wiring
Run bun test — all tests must pass
Commit: phase-6: add plugin factory for config-to-pipeline wiring

tasks.description: run command + signal handling: load config, instantiate plugins, start pipeline, handle SIGINT/SIGTERM with graceful shutdown, double-signal force exit, shutdown timeout
steps: Create src/cli/commands/run.ts
Implementation flow: parse config → configure logger → log banner → build pipeline → start → register signals → await termination → stop → exit
Signal handling: SIGINT/SIGTERM → graceful shutdown, double signal → force exit
Shutdown timeout: 30s safety net
Error handling: config errors → exit 1, connect errors → exit 1, service input errors → warn + continue
Log startup banner and shutdown summary
Write tests in test/unit/cli/run.test.ts: config load failure, parse failure, plugin connect error, graceful shutdown sequence
Run bun test — all tests must pass
Commit: phase-6: add run command with signal handling and graceful shutdown

tasks.description: Systemd unit file and README docs
steps: Create deploy/collatr-edge.service with hardening options
Add installation instructions to README.md (systemd section)
Run bun test — all tests must pass (no regressions from any README changes)
Commit: phase-6: add systemd unit file and deployment docs
